aionima.name: Plaid
aionima.description: Plaid API consumer plugin — links bank accounts, fetches transactions and balances, verifies account holder identity. Plaid Link OAuth flow + 4 agent tools (list-accounts / fetch-transactions / get-balance / identity-verify) for use by the Accounting / Budget / Expense MApps and any other tool consumer. Owner-entered credentials sealed via TPM2.
